import io
import string

fn second_token(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  let start = i
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  if start == i
    None
  else
    Some(string.substring(line, start, i))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut eof = false
while not eof
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
      match second_token(line)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          total = total + n
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    eof = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
